# ReceiptExpenses

> ReceiptExpenses (https://receiptexpenses.com) is a free, private online receipt maker that generates pixel-perfect PDF and PNG expense records directly in your browser — nothing is uploaded to a server. Pick one of 24+ templates, fill in a live form, and the receipt builds in real time. Building and previewing require no account; downloading, printing and saving require only a free account (sign up with email or Google).

## What it is for

ReceiptExpenses helps people and small businesses create receipts for their **own** business, freelancing or personal record-keeping — for example issuing proof of payment to a customer, reconstructing a lost receipt of a real purchase for expense records, or replacing a faded/lost receipt for reimbursement documentation. Brand-styled templates (e.g. "Walmart Style Receipt", "Airbnb Style Receipt") are independent, customizable templates styled after common receipt formats — ReceiptExpenses is not affiliated with any of these companies. It must not be used to impersonate real companies or to forge receipts intended to deceive others.

## Key facts

- Price: free (no paid tier currently). A free account unlocks download (PDF/PNG), print and save.
- Privacy: 100% client-side generation — receipt content, business details and logos never leave the browser.
- Export: pixel-perfect PDF and PNG, plus direct browser printing.
- Sign-in: email/password or Google (one click).
- Templates: 24+ receipt types across Business, Retail, Food & Drink, Travel and Services.

## Key pages

- [Create a receipt](https://receiptexpenses.com/create): The live editor — choose a template, fill in details, preview, download or print.
- [Receipt types](https://receiptexpenses.com/receipts): Browse every template by category.
- [FAQ](https://receiptexpenses.com/faq): Cost, privacy, formats and customization.
- [About](https://receiptexpenses.com/about): What the product is and the privacy-first philosophy behind it.

## Receipt templates by category

### Business
- [Generic Sales Receipt Maker](https://receiptexpenses.com/receipts/generic): clean itemized sales receipt for any business.
- [Online Order Receipt Maker](https://receiptexpenses.com/receipts/marketplace): e-commerce order confirmation receipt.

### Retail
- [Walmart Style Receipt Maker](https://receiptexpenses.com/receipts/walmart): thermal POS superstore receipt template (independent, for lost-receipt reconstruction).
- [Amazon Style Invoice Maker](https://receiptexpenses.com/receipts/amazon): online marketplace order receipt template.
- [Nike Receipt Maker](https://receiptexpenses.com/receipts/nike): sportswear retail receipt template.
- [Adidas Receipt Maker](https://receiptexpenses.com/receipts/adidas): sportswear retail receipt template.
- [Apple Receipt Maker](https://receiptexpenses.com/receipts/apple): electronics store receipt template.
- [Jordan Receipt Maker](https://receiptexpenses.com/receipts/jordan): sneaker retail receipt template.
- [Thermal / POS Receipt Maker](https://receiptexpenses.com/receipts/thermal): generic cash-register slip.
- [Grocery / Market Receipt Maker](https://receiptexpenses.com/receipts/grocery): supermarket receipt.
- [Superstore / Big-Box Receipt Maker](https://receiptexpenses.com/receipts/bigbox): big-box store receipt.
- [Electronics Store Receipt Maker](https://receiptexpenses.com/receipts/electronics): electronics purchase receipt.

### Food & Drink
- [Restaurant Receipt Maker](https://receiptexpenses.com/receipts/restaurant): itemized dining receipt with tip.
- [Café / Coffee Receipt Maker](https://receiptexpenses.com/receipts/cafe): coffee-shop receipt.
- [Starbucks Style Receipt Maker](https://receiptexpenses.com/receipts/starbucks): coffee-chain style receipt template.

### Travel
- [Airbnb Style Receipt Maker](https://receiptexpenses.com/receipts/airbnb): vacation rental / lodging receipt template with check-in details.
- [Uber Style Ride Receipt Maker](https://receiptexpenses.com/receipts/uber): rideshare trip receipt template.
- [Hotel / Lodging Receipt Maker](https://receiptexpenses.com/receipts/hotel): hotel folio receipt.
- [Vacation Rental Receipt Maker](https://receiptexpenses.com/receipts/vacation-rental): short-stay rental receipt.
- [Fuel / Gas Receipt Maker](https://receiptexpenses.com/receipts/fuel): gas station receipt.
- [Taxi / Transport Receipt Maker](https://receiptexpenses.com/receipts/taxi): taxi fare receipt.
- [Parking Receipt Maker](https://receiptexpenses.com/receipts/parking): parking fee receipt.

### Services
- [Service Invoice Receipt Maker](https://receiptexpenses.com/receipts/service): labor/service payment receipt.
- [Pharmacy Receipt Maker](https://receiptexpenses.com/receipts/pharmacy): pharmacy purchase receipt.

## How it works

1. Choose a template that matches your situation.
2. Fill in your business, items, currency, tax and tip — and upload your own logo.
3. Watch the live preview update with every change.
4. Create a free account (email or Google) to download a pixel-perfect PDF or PNG, or print.

## Policies

- [Privacy Policy](https://receiptexpenses.com/privacy): How data is handled (receipt content stays in the browser).
- [Cookie Policy](https://receiptexpenses.com/cookies): The minimal cookies and local storage used.
- [Terms of Use](https://receiptexpenses.com/terms): Acceptable use, including no impersonation or fraud.
- [Contact](https://receiptexpenses.com/contact): support@receiptexpenses.com

## Support

An in-app AI chat assistant is available in the corner of every page to answer questions about templates, downloads and accounts.
